description: During a match earlier today, I observed a player exhibiting behavior that strongly suggests the use of cheats or unauthorized modifications. This player consistently displayed an unnaturally high level of accuracy, making shots that seemed improbable or impossible without assistance. Additionally, there were instances where their movements appeared to be unnaturally fast and precise, further indicating the use of cheats.
